runs.context_blueprint: {"language": "dart", "build_system": "flutter", "package_manager": "pub", "build_commands": ["flutter pub get", "flutter test"], "install_commands": ["apt-get update", "apt-get install -y curl git unzip xz-utils zip", "rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*"], "runtime_requirements": {"language_version": "2.12.0", "system_packages": ["curl", "git", "unzip", "xz-utils", "zip"]}, "repo_type": "monorepo", "base_image": "ubuntu:jammy-20260217", "base_image_rationale": "A stable, widely-supported Debian-based image with apt access suitable for installing Flutter/Dart tooling in CI/CD style containers.", "pitfalls": ["Building Android APKs or using iOS tooling requires additional platform-specific SDKs and licenses not included in a minimal Ubuntu base image.", "GUI dependencies and emulators are not available by default in headless containers; running UI apps locally may require X11/Wayland setup.", "Flutter licenses may need acceptance in the container; consider running flutter doctor and accepting licenses as part of the build."], "notes": "This blueprint targets running Flutter tests for the root photo_view package and the example app. A multi-stage approach can separate pub cache from runtime. If Android/iOS builds are needed, additional SDKs, licenses, and emulators must be added."}
runs.final_dockerfile:
# Dockerfile for Flutter project - builds from source using a Ubuntu base image

FROM ubuntu:jammy-20260217 as builder

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install required system dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  curl \
  git \
  unzip \
  xz-utils \
  zip \
  ca-certificates \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Flutter SDK (stable) by cloning the repository
WORKDIR /opt
RUN git clone -b stable https://github.com/flutter/flutter.git
ENV FLUTTER_ROOT=/opt/flutter
ENV PATH="$FLUTTER_ROOT/bin:$FLUTTER_ROOT/bin/cache/dart-sdk/bin:$PATH"

# Copy the source code and fetch/build dependencies
WORKDIR /workspace
COPY . .

# Get Dart/Flutter dependencies and run tests to validate the build
RUN flutter pub get
RUN flutter test

# Runtime image
FROM ubuntu:jammy-20260217 as runtime

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  curl \
  git \
  unzip \
  xz-utils \
  zip \
  ca-certificates \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy Flutter SDK from builder and set PATH
COPY --from=builder /opt/flutter /opt/flutter
ENV FLUTTER_ROOT=/opt/flutter
ENV PATH="$FLUTTER_ROOT/bin:$FLUTTER_ROOT/bin/cache/dart-sdk/bin:$PATH"

# Copy the project files from the builder stage
COPY --from=builder /workspace /workspace

# Default to a shell in the final image; user can run flutter commands as needed
CMD ["/bin/bash"]

{"path": ".dockerignore", "content": "# Flutter/Ddart project ignore rules for Docker build

# Git repository
.git/

# Dart/Flutter tooling caches
.dart_tool/
.packages
.pub-cache/
.pub-cache

# Build outputs
build/
example/.dart_tool/
example/.pub-cache/

# Dependency lock files
pubspec.lock
**/pubspec.lock

# IDE files
*.iml
.idea/
.vscode/
.DS_Store

# Local environment files
.env
"}

artifacts.content:
# Dockerfile for Flutter project - builds from source using a Ubuntu base image

FROM ubuntu:jammy-20260217 as builder

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install required system dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  curl \
  git \
  unzip \
  xz-utils \
  zip \
  ca-certificates \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Flutter SDK (stable) by cloning the repository
WORKDIR /opt
RUN git clone -b stable https://github.com/flutter/flutter.git
ENV FLUTTER_ROOT=/opt/flutter
ENV PATH="$FLUTTER_ROOT/bin:$FLUTTER_ROOT/bin/cache/dart-sdk/bin:$PATH"

# Copy the source code and fetch/build dependencies
WORKDIR /workspace
COPY . .

# Get Dart/Flutter dependencies and run tests to validate the build
RUN flutter pub get
RUN flutter test

# Runtime image
FROM ubuntu:jammy-20260217 as runtime

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  curl \
  git \
  unzip \
  xz-utils \
  zip \
  ca-certificates \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy Flutter SDK from builder and set PATH
COPY --from=builder /opt/flutter /opt/flutter
ENV FLUTTER_ROOT=/opt/flutter
ENV PATH="$FLUTTER_ROOT/bin:$FLUTTER_ROOT/bin/cache/dart-sdk/bin:$PATH"

# Copy the project files from the builder stage
COPY --from=builder /workspace /workspace

# Default to a shell in the final image; user can run flutter commands as needed
CMD ["/bin/bash"]
